summary: Strategic analytics leader with a proven track record of solving complex business challenges by owning the full data science lifecycle, from deep data analysis and advanced modeling to developing actionable recommendations. Adept at translating data insights into compelling strategies, driving implementation, and measuring impact to optimize decision-making for senior executives.

highlights: Directed cross-functional team of 10 engineers and analysts to architect end-to-end analytical frameworks, transforming raw mission data into prescriptive intelligence for executive leadership.
Engineered a readiness platform for 17K+ global assets; leveraged SQL and interactive visualization for spatiotemporal root-cause analysis, reducing diagnostic discovery time by over 10 days.
Modernized enterprise financial forecasting by architecting automated Databricks ETL pipelines, increasing accuracy by 12% through advanced time-series ensemble models.
Developed a scalable Python automation framework to modernize complex inventory audit workflows for the USMC, reducing reporting latency by 80% and ensuring data integrity.
Spearheaded data architecture and Python/SQL ETL for a Coast Guard Data Warehouse, engineering predictive maintenance models and self-service BI suites for proactive asset management.
Directed an enterprise-wide Business Intelligence suite for 500+ stakeholders, automating 60% of manual reporting and centralizing financial data in Power BI, accelerating decision-making.

skills.label: Data Science & Advanced Analytics
skills.details: Machine Learning, Predictive Modeling, Causal Inference, Statistical Analysis, Operations Research, Generative AI, R

skills.label: Data Engineering & Cloud Platforms
skills.details: Python, SQL, ETL, Spark, BigQuery, Azure, Databricks, Data Engineering

skills.label: Business Intelligence & Strategic Tools
skills.details: Power BI, Tableau, Dashboarding, Project Management, Excel, Power Query, Power Automate, Power Apps
